Kara Flageollet, Esq. 415-246-6286 kflageollet@shb.com Shook Hardy & Bacon for Defendant MONSANTO COMPANY, WILBURE-ELLIS COMPANY et al.

Hearing is held. The Court poses questions to Ms. Flageollet and Mr. Jaszewski. The Court shares its views and admonishes parties. Ms. Flageollet apologizes to the court and requests the matter be taken off calendar. Mr. Jaszewski apologizes and submits to the court. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.
